types.description: A marketplace offer has arrived and the owner must decide how to respond.

execution_goal.counter: The owner has chosen to counter this offer. Use the gog gmail skill to reply to the buyer on thread {{gmail_thread_id}} using the response_body from the resolver artifacts as the message body. Then call aura_log_action with action='email_response_sent' and connector_used='gmail'. Finally call aura_complete_contract.
execution_goal.accept: The owner has accepted this offer. Use the gog gmail skill to send an acceptance reply on thread {{gmail_thread_id}}. Then call aura_log_action with action='email_response_sent' and connector_used='gmail'. Finally call aura_complete_contract.
execution_goal.decline: The owner has declined this offer. Only send a reply if decline_with_message is true in the resolver artifacts. Call aura_complete_contract when done.

types.description: A listing draft is ready for owner review before publishing to a marketplace platform.

execution_goal.approve: The owner has approved this listing draft. Publish it to {{platform}} using the available platform tool or skill. Then call aura_log_action with action='listing_published' and aura_complete_contract.
execution_goal.revise: The owner has requested revisions. Update the draft at {{draft_path}} with the changes from the resolver artifacts. Call aura_complete_contract when the draft is saved.
execution_goal.discard: The owner has discarded this draft. Archive or delete the file at {{draft_path}}. Call aura_complete_contract.

types.description: A shipment is delayed and the owner must decide whether to notify the buyer.

execution_goal.notify: The owner wants to notify the buyer of the delay. Use the gog gmail skill to send a message to the buyer. The message template is in the resolver artifacts under response_body. Then call aura_log_action with action='buyer_notified' and aura_complete_contract.
execution_goal.ignore: The owner has decided not to notify the buyer. Call aura_complete_contract.

types.description: Inventory is running low in a category. Owner should review the restock suggestion.

execution_goal.restock: The owner has approved the restock suggestion. Record the restock decision in the PARA resources folder under resources/platform-policies/. Call aura_log_action with action='restock_approved' and aura_complete_contract.
execution_goal.dismiss: The owner has dismissed the alert. Call aura_complete_contract.
